hard_gates.message: common_ai_agent rtl-gen provenance covers the Starter RTL manifest.

soft_gates.message: Starter contract is ready for LLM-authored RTL; Starter gates are relaxed but RTL must be real authored RTL.

deferred_gates.decision_needed: Assign every SSOT function/decomposition behavior to an RTL module contract.
deferred_gates.evidence: These SSOT refs have no owning RTL module contract: function_model.state_variables.duty_reg, function_model.state_variables.counter, decomposition.units.counter, decomposition.units.compare, decomposition.units.csr_decode

policy: Starter produces real LLM-authored RTL with relaxed gates. Deferred gates remain non-blocking in Starter and become blocking in Engineering/Signoff as applicable.
